GetReservedInstancePrice.offeringType: Payment type. Options: FullyPrepay: full upfront; PartPrepay: partial upfront; NoPrepay: no upfront.
GetReservedInstancePrice.scope: Availability scope of reserved instance; default AZ-level: AZ; region-level: Region
GetReservedInstancePrice.reservedInstanceCount: Total price for any number of instances under the specified spec. Must be a positive integer. Optional, default is 1.
GetReservedInstancePrice.priceTimeUnit: Post-paid billing time unit. Options: month: billed monthly; hour: billed hourly (default).
GetReservedInstancePrice.reservedInstanceTime: Reserved instance purchase duration, [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,12,24,36], unit: month.
GetReservedInstancePrice.purchaseNum: Number of reserved instances to purchase
